transactions.description: Washington Nationals sent RHP Paxton Schultz on a rehab assignment to Rochester Red Wings.
Miami Marlins placed LF Christopher Morel on the 10-day injured list retroactive to March 25, 2026. Left oblique strain.
Chicago White Sox activated LHP Bryan Hudson.
Miami Marlins recalled 3B Deyvison De Los Santos from Jacksonville Jumbo Shrimp.
